title: Define and implement CopilotKit chat UX contract
goals: Make the CopilotKit chat usable as the primary left sidebar AI chat.
Cover new chat, empty state, loading state, streaming answer, error state and compact tool trace.
Keep the UI consistent with the existing Django application shell.
non_goals: Do not redesign the full application navigation.
Do not implement native AG-UI UI.
Do not add domain write actions in the browser.
acceptance: The user can start a new chat in CopilotKit mode.
The first answer streams or appears without requiring page reload.
Empty, loading and error states are visible and not layout-breaking.
Tool activity is shown without raw sensitive payload.
A Playwright check covers the main chat path.
